Bash(C:/Users/TAOYUAN/PycharmProjects/pythonProject2/venv311/Scripts/python.exe - << 'PYEOF'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
import sys, os
sys.path.insert\(0, r'C:\\Users\\TAOYUAN\\PycharmProjects\\auto_report'\)
from docx import Document
from docx.shared import Pt
from docx.oxml.ns import qn
from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH

def set_font\(run, name, size_pt\):
    rPr = run._element.get_or_add_rPr\(\)
    rf  = rPr.get_or_add_rFonts\(\)
    for attr in \('w:ascii','w:hAnsi','w:eastAsia'\):
        rf.set\(qn\(attr\), name\)
    run.font.size = Pt\(size_pt\)

def add_indent\(para, twips=640\):
    pPr = para._element.get_or_add_pPr\(\)
    ind = OxmlElement\('w:ind'\)
    ind.set\(qn\('w:firstLine'\), str\(twips\)\)
    pPr.append\(ind\)

doc = Document\(\)
# 删除默认空段
for p in list\(doc.paragraphs\):
    p._element.getparent\(\).remove\(p._element\)

# ── 标题段（居中，标题+副标题同段）──
p_title = doc.add_paragraph\(\)
p_title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER

r_title = p_title.add_run\('天府市民云{{yesterday_md}}运行情况'\)
set_font\(r_title, '方正小标宋_GBK', 16\)
r_title._element.append\(OxmlElement\('w:br'\)\)  # 软换行

r_sub = p_title.add_run\('（报市城运中心当日值班组）'\)
set_font\(r_sub, '楷体', 14\)

# ── 正文第一段 ──
p1 = doc.add_paragraph\(\)
add_indent\(p1, 640\)
r1 = p1.add_run\(
    '{{yesterday_ymd}}，当日活跃用户{{platform_dau}}，增幅{{dau_growth}}，'
    '当日核心功能服务{{core_service_sum}}人次，'
    '当日新增注册用户数{{new_register_users}}人，'
    '累计注册总用户数{{total_register_users}}人。'
\)
set_font\(r1, '仿宋', 16\)

# ── 正文第二段 ──
p2 = doc.add_paragraph\(\)
add_indent\(p2, 640\)
r2 = p2.add_run\('从服务项目使用情况：当日使用增幅排前5位的是{{top5_services}}。'\)
set_font\(r2, '仿宋', 16\)

out = r'C:\\Users\\TAOYUAN\\PycharmProjects\\auto_report\\templates\\示例-日报.docx'
doc.save\(out\)
print\('已生成:', out\)
PYEOF)
